module.name: addstyle
module.description: Apply scoped CSS to a region. Section 1 = CSS, section 2 = content. Selectors are auto-prefixed with a unique scope class, so the CSS only affects this block (e.g. override drawio fonts per diagram).
module.aiSpec:
Apply CSS that affects only one block of content (selectors are auto-scoped to this instance, so they never leak to other slides/diagrams). Use @addclass instead when a suitable theme/utility class already exists. No parameters. Block module split by `<!-- @ -->` into two sections: section 1 = raw CSS rules, section 2 = the markdown content the CSS applies to. Common use: resize an image or override a drawio diagram's font. Flat rules only get scoped; @-rules are left as-is. Gotcha: omit the `<!-- @ -->` separator and the single section is treated as content (no CSS applied).
You MAY wrap the CSS section in an HTML comment (put `<!--` and `-->` on their own lines around the rules). MDP unwraps and applies it as usual, but a PLAIN Markdown viewer (e.g. GitHub) then hides the CSS instead of showing it as text. The content section is left as-is. (Keep `<!--`/`-->` on their own lines; don't start the CSS with an @-rule on the same line as `<!--`.)
Example: <!-- @addstyle --> img { height: 450px; } <!-- @ --> ![](@screenshot) <!-- @end -->
Same, with the CSS hidden from plain Markdown viewers: <!-- @addstyle --> <!-- img { height: 450px; } --> <!-- @ --> ![](@screenshot) <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Scoped style
snippet.description: Apply CSS only to the content inside this block (selectors auto-scoped).

snippet.label: Scoped style (hidden in plain Markdown)
snippet.description: CSS wrapped in an HTML comment: MDP applies it, a plain Markdown viewer hides it.

snippet.label: Scoped style (drawio font)
snippet.description: Override the drawio font only for the diagram inside this block.

snippet.label: Scoped style in a free box
snippet.text: <!-- @freebox x: 50, y: 40, w: 40, h: 30 --> <!-- @addstyle --> .mdp-drawio-svg { --mdp-drawio-font: "Noto Sans JP"; --mdp-drawio-font-size: 16px; } <!-- @ --> ![@drawio](data:image/svg+xml;base64,...) <!-- @end --> <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A movable free box whose drawio uses a specific font.
